description_for_human: Free to read. Paid to cite. Query the bucket.foundation research canon — axioms, laws, first principles — over the feed402 / x402 rail.
description_for_model: Query the bucket.foundation research canon. Every response returns a feed402/0.2 envelope with data, citation, receipt, cite (price_usd, payout_wallet, license), tags, canon_tier, foundation_branches, and provenance. Free to read. Citations cost $0.002 (insight) / $0.010 (query) / $0.050 (raw) per call on Base via USDC. A zero-key proxy is available at /api/research. License: bucket.foundation/cite-forever/v0.1.
